arts.ttl: Crystal Palace will not block Adam Wharton from England call-up should ex-Blackburn midfielder make Thomas Tuchel’s first squad
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says Crystal Palace will not block Adam Wharton from joining up with England if he is called up to Thomas Tuchel’s first squad. “If not, he will join the England squad.”

arts.ttl: Glasner outlines Marbella plans and focus of mid-season training
arts.sum: With only two games to go in the month of March, separated by over 20 days, Crystal Palace will be heading to a warm weather training camp in Marbella next week to prepare for the remainder of the campaign – with Oliver Glasner detailing the goals of the trip.

arts.ttl: Mateta hopefully back at end of month - Glasner
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner says Jean-Philippe Mateta is "recovering well" from his head injury and will hopefully be fit to face Fulham on 29 March.
Crystal Palace have completed the signing of Rylan Brownlie.
